projectDescription: An AI-powered platform that provides personalized wisdom from the ancient Tamil text Thirukkural, matching users to relevant verses based on their emotions, personality type, and life situations.
keyFeatures: Personality quiz with 15 questions to classify users into 5 personality types (Wise Seeker, Compassionate Heart, Strong Leader, Peaceful Soul, Ambitious Achiever)
Emotion-based Kural search with synonym expansion and semantic scoring via UniqueRagKuralFetcher
AI-powered agent backed by Google Vertex AI (Gemini) that generates personalized guidance grounded in Thirukkural verses
Bilingual support for Tamil and English Kural display with traditional 4-3 word line formatting
Dark/light theme toggle and responsive design built with Next.js 16, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion
FastAPI backend with CORS support exposing the Thirukkural agent over HTTP
Custom RAG retriever scoring Kurals by emotion, theme, virtue, and modern scenario relevance
Surprise Me feature that returns a personality-matched random Kural
publicApiSurface: POST /api/v1/ask — Submit a question and optional personality profile to get AI-generated Kural guidance
GET /health — Health check endpoint returning service status
fetchAgentResponse(question, personality?, signal?) — Frontend TypeScript client for the agent API
analyzePersonality(answers) — Derives a Personality object from quiz answers
getRandomKuralByPersonality(personalityType) — Returns a random Kural matched to a personality type
UniqueRagKuralFetcher.search(query, top_k?) — Scores and retrieves top-k Kurals for a free-form query
UniqueRagKuralFetcher.to_context_block(results) — Formats retrieved Kurals into a plain-text context string for the LLM
